name: OpenClaw Host Git Workflow
description: Host-backed git workflow scaffold with bundled skill and bounded runtime slices for planning, repo resolution, node selection, preflight, push, PR creation, checks wait, merge, and sync-main.

repoPath.description: Optional explicit repo path override for workflow planning.

baseBranch.description: Preferred base branch for later host-backed finish flow.

nodeSelector.description: Optional host node selector used to bind the bounded workflow to one concrete node before host-backed execution.
